debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

failed_attempts:
have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at hE
  have hk : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by rw [ω_sq]; field_simp [S.m_pos.ne']
  rw [hk] at hE
  constructor
  · intro h
    simp only [h, norm_zero, zero_pow (by norm_num : 2 ≠ 0), mul_zero, zero_add] at hE
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    rw [← hE, add_comm]
    exact (Real.sqrt_sq (norm_nonneg _)).symm
  · intro h
    rw [h, Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)] at hE
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    ring_nf at hE
    simp only [add_left_eq_self, mul_eq_zero, S.m_pos.ne', false_or, pow_eq_zero_iff,
      OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero] at hE
    rwa [norm_eq_zero] at hE

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  have hm : S.m ≠ 0 := S.m_pos.ne.symm
  have hw : S.ω ≠ 0 := S.ω_neq_zero
  replace hE : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
      S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    rwa [← mul_add, ← mul_add, mul_right_inj' (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) / 2 ≠ 0)] at hE
  have hk : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by
    refine eq_mul_of_div_eq_right hm ?_
    rw [ω_sq]
  rw [hk] at hE
  replace hE : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    rw [← mul_add, ← mul_add, mul_right_inj' hm] at hE
    exact hE
  constructor
  · intro hv
    rw [hv, norm_zero, zero_pow two_ne_zero, zero_add] at hE
    apply eq_of_sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _)
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
    field_simp [hw]
    rw [← hE]
    ring
  · intro hx_eq
    rw [hx_eq, Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)] at hE
    field_simp [hw] at hE
    rw [← add_assoc, add_right_eq_self, add_right_eq_self] at hE
    simpa [norm_eq_zero] using hE

have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
  have h_conserved : S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 + ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 =

  · intro hv
    rw [hv] at h_conserved
    simp only [norm_zero, zero_pow two_ne_zero, add_zero] at h_conserved
    apply mul_left_cancel₀ (pow_ne_zero 2 hω)
    rw [h_conserved]
    field_simp [hω]
  · intro h
    rw [h] at h_conserved
    field_simp [hω] at h_conserved
    rw [add_comm (S.ω ^ 2 * _), add_comm _ (‖_‖ ^ 2)] at h_conserved
    simpa using h_conserved

have hw : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  have h_cons : S.ω^2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖^2 + ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖^2 =

    rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← h_cons]
    ring_nf
    simp [norm_eq_zero]

have h_identity : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖^2 + S.ω^2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖^2 =
      ‖IC.v₀‖^2 + S.ω^2 * ‖IC.x₀‖^2 := by

    rw [abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _), abs_of_nonneg (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt]

    rw [trajectory_eq, trajectory_velocity]
    simp only [norm_add_sq_eq_norm_sq_add_norm_sq_add_two_inner,
      norm_sub_sq_eq_norm_sq_add_norm_sq_sub_two_inner, norm_smul, inner_smul_left,
      inner_smul_right, Real.norm_eq_abs, mul_pow, div_pow, abs_pow]
    field_simp [hω]
    trans (sin (S.ω * t.val) ^ 2 + cos (S.ω * t.val) ^ 2) * (S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2)
    · ring_nf
      simp only [real_inner_comm IC.v₀ IC.x₀]
      ring
    · rw [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq, one_mul]
  rw [← sq_eq_sq (by positivity) (by positivity), Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h] at h_cons
    simp at h_cons
    exact h_cons
  · intro h
    rw [h] at h_cons
    field_simp [hω] at h_cons
    rw [add_left_eq_self] at h_cons
    simpa [hω] using h_cons

have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  let x := IC.trajectory S t
  let v := ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t
  have h_cons : ‖v‖^2 + (S.ω * ‖x‖)^2 = ‖IC.v₀‖^2 + (S.ω * ‖IC.x₀‖)^2 := by
    dsimp [x, v]
    rw [trajectory_eq, trajectory_velocity]
    simp only [← real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
    rw [inner_add_right, inner_add_right, inner_sub_left, inner_sub_left]
    simp only [inner_add_left, inner_sub_right, inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right,
      real_inner_comm IC.x₀ IC.v₀]
    field_simp
    ring_nf
    simp only [← add_mul, sin_sq_add_cos_sq, one_mul]
    ring
  constructor
  · intro hv
    rw [hv, norm_zero, zero_pow two_ne_zero, zero_add] at h_cons
    rw [mul_pow] at h_cons
    have : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ := norm_nonneg _
    rw [← sq_eq_sq this (by positivity), h_cons]
    field_simp
  · intro hx_val
    rw [hx_val] at h_cons
    rw [mul_pow, sq_sqrt (by positivity)] at h_cons
    field_simp at h_cons
    rw [← add_assoc, add_comm (‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2)] at h_cons
    simp at h_cons
    rwa [norm_eq_zero, sq_eq_zero_iff]

have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  have h_id : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
      S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    rw [trajectory_velocity, trajectory_eq]
    simp only [norm_add_sq_real, inner_add_left, inner_add_right, inner_smul_left,
      inner_smul_right, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, real_inner_comm, mul_pow]
    ring_nf
    field_simp
    ring
  rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _)]
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h, zero_add] at h_id
    refine (sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _)).1 ?_
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))]
    apply mul_left_cancel₀ (pow_ne_zero 2 hω)
    field_simp
    rw [h_id]
    ring
  · intro h
    rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _),
      Real.sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))] at h
    field_simp at h
    rw [h] at h_id
    ring_nf at h_id
    exact h_id

rw [← sq_eq_sq (by fun_prop) (by positivity), Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
  have h : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    rw [trajectory_velocity, trajectory_eq]
    simp only [norm_add_sq_real, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, sq_abs,
      inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, real_inner_comm IC.x₀ IC.v₀]
    field_simp [ω_neq_zero S]
    ring
  constructor
  · intro h0
    simp [h0] at h
    field_simp [ω_neq_zero S] at h ⊢
    rw [add_comm]
    exact h
  · intro h0
    field_simp [ω_neq_zero S] at h0
    rw [add_comm, h0] at h
    simp only [add_right_eq_self, sq_eq_zero_iff, norm_eq_zero] at h
    exact h

have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  have hm : S.m ≠ 0 := fun h => hω (by simp [ω_sq, h])
  have hE := trajectory_energy S IC
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  replace hE := congr_fun hE t
  have hk : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by rw [ω_sq]; field_simp [hm]
  rw [hk] at hE
  field_simp [hm] at hE
  rw [norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero (by positivity),
    ← add_right_inj (S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2), hE, eq_comm,
    Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by positivity) (by positivity)]
  field_simp [hω]
  ring

have hE := trajectory_energy S IC
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  replace hE := congr_fun hE t
  have hw : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  field_simp [hw] at hE ⊢
  rw [ω_sq] at hE ⊢
  have hm : S.m ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply hw; simp [ω_sq, h]
  have hk : S.k ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply hw; simp [ω_sq, h]
  field_simp [hm, hk] at hE ⊢
  rw [eq_comm, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
  · constructor
    · intro h
      rw [h] at hE
      simp at hE
      exact hE.symm
    · intro h
      rw [h] at hE
      simp [hm] at hE
      rwa [← sq_eq_zero_iff, ← norm_eq_zero]
  · apply norm_nonneg

have hm : S.m ≠ 0 := by
    intro h
    have h' : S.ω ^ 2 = 0 := by rw [ω_sq, h, div_zero]
    simp at h'
    exact S.ω_neq_zero h'
  have hk : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by
    rw [ω_sq]
    field_simp [hm]
  have hE := trajectory_energy S IC
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  replace hE := congr_fun hE t
  rw [hk] at hE
  rw [norm_eq_zero]
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h] at hE
    simp only [zero_pow (by norm_num : 2 ≠ 0), mul_zero, add_zero] at hE
    field_simp [hm, S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
    · field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero]
      rw [hE]
      ring
    · exact add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)
    · exact norm_nonneg _
  · intro h
    rw [h] at hE
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))] at hE
    field_simp [hm, S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    ring_nf at hE
    simpa [hm] using hE

have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := S.ω_neq_zero
  have h_energy : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖^2 + (S.ω * ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖)^2 =
      (S.ω * ‖IC.x₀‖)^2 + ‖IC.v₀‖^2 := by
    rw [trajectory_velocity, trajectory_eq]
    simp only [norm_add_sq_real, norm_smul, mul_pow, Real.norm_eq_abs, sq_abs,
      inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, real_inner_comm, neg_smul, norm_neg,
      div_pow]
    field_simp
    ring
  rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h, zero_add] at h_energy
    rw [← sq_eq_sq (by positivity) (by positivity), add_comm]
    field_simp [h_energy]
  · intro h
    rw [← sq_eq_sq (by positivity) (by positivity)] at h
    field_simp at h
    rw [h] at h_energy
    ring_nf at h_energy
    simp at h_energy
    exact h_energy

have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := S.ω_neq_zero
  have h_cons : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 + ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 / S.ω ^ 2 =
      ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
    rw [trajectory_eq, trajectory_velocity]
    simp only [norm_add_sq_real, inner_add_left, inner_add_right, inner_smul_left,
      inner_smul_right, real_inner_comm, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, sq_abs, mul_pow, div_pow]
    field_simp
    ring_nf
    simp only [sin_sq_add_cos_sq, one_mul]
  rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), ← h_cons]
  constructor
  · intro h
    simp [h]
  · intro h
    simp [h] at h_cons
    rw [add_left_eq_self, div_eq_zero_iff] at h_cons
    cases h_cons with
    | inl h =>
      rw [sq_eq_zero_iff, norm_eq_zero] at h
      exact h
    | inr h => exact (pow_ne_zero _ hω h).elim

have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  have h_cons : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 =
      S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    rw [trajectory_velocity, trajectory_eq]
    simp only [norm_add_sq, norm_smul, mul_pow, real_inner_smul_left,
      real_inner_smul_right, Real.norm_eq_abs, sq_abs, norm_neg]
    rw [real_inner_comm IC.x₀ IC.v₀]
    field_simp
    ring_nf
    simp only [sin_sq_add_cos_sq, one_mul]
    ring
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h] at h_cons
    simp only [norm_zero, zero_pow two_ne_zero, zero_add] at h_cons
    field_simp at h_cons ⊢
    rw [← h_cons]
    rw [Real.sqrt_sq (by positivity)]
  · intro h
    rw [h] at h_cons
    have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by positivity
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt h_nonneg] at h_cons
    field_simp at h_cons
    ring_nf at h_cons
    simp only [add_left_eq_self] at h_cons
    exact norm_eq_zero.mp (sq_eq_zero_iff.mp h_cons)

rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero_iff]
  have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  have hk : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by rw [eq_comm, ← div_eq_iff S.m_pos.ne', ← ω_sq]
  rw [hk] at hE
  have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  replace hE : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2
  · field_simp [S.m_pos.ne'] at hE; exact hE
  rw [← eq_sub_iff_add_eq] at hE
  rw [hE, sub_eq_zero, eq_comm, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
  · field_simp [hω]; ring
  · apply add_nonneg <;> apply sq_nonneg
  · apply norm_nonneg

have hm : S.m ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have := ω_neq_zero S; rw [ω_sq, h] at this; simp at this
  have hk : S.k ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have := ω_neq_zero S; rw [ω_sq, h] at this; simp at this
  have hE := trajectory_energy S IC
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  replace hE := congr_fun hE t
  rw [iff_def]
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h] at hE
    simp only [norm_zero, zero_pow, mul_zero, add_zero] at hE
    field_simp at hE
    rw [sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _)]
    field_simp [ω_sq, hm, hk] at hE ⊢
    rw [hE]
    ring
  · intro h
    rw [h, sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))] at hE
    field_simp [ω_sq, hm, hk] at hE
    ring_nf at hE
    rw [mul_eq_zero] at hE
    simp only [hk, hm, false_or, sq_eq_zero_iff, norm_eq_zero] at hE
    exact hE
